definition: Ability to detect relevant system change and weak signals
measurement_note: Measure relevance coverage frequency accessibility and data quality

definition: Ability to preserve ecological institutional technical and community knowledge
measurement_note: Review archives staff continuity records local knowledge and ecological legacies

definition: Extent to which observed feedback changes decisions
measurement_note: Look for evidence of revised rules budgets designs thresholds and practice

definition: Ability to revise decisions while remaining accountable
measurement_note: Assess authority escalation protocols legal flexibility participation and transparency

definition: Integration of local worker Indigenous and affected-community knowledge
measurement_note: Participation must shape decisions not merely validate them

definition: Extent to which learning reduces unequal exposure and remembers harm
measurement_note: Use disaggregated evidence and accountability for vulnerable groups

definition: Ability to implement lessons rather than only document them
measurement_note: Track assignment funding completion deadlines and public follow-through

definition: Risk of institutional amnesia ecological memory loss turnover erasure or archive failure
measurement_note: Higher values reduce adaptive learning value
